_.$description: Border color for danger actions or messages (red.60).

strong.$description: Strong border color for danger actions or messages (red.70).

stronger.$description: Stronger border color for danger actions or messages (red.80).

strongest.$description: Strongest border color for danger actions or messages (red.90).

weak.$description: Weak border color for danger actions or messages (red.40).

weaker.$description: Weaker border color for danger actions or messages (red.20).

weakest.$description: Weakest border color for danger actions or messages (red.10).

strong.$description: Strong border color for neutral elements (gray.70)

stronger.$description: Stronger border color for neutral elements (gray.80)

strongest.$description: Strongest border color for neutral elements (gray.90)

weak.$description: Weak border color for neutral elements (gray.40)

weaker.$description: Weaker border color for neutral elements (gray.20)

weakest.$description: Weakest border color for neutral elements (gray.10)

_.$description: Border color for primary actions or messages (blue.60).

strong.$description: Strong border color for primary actions or messages (blue.70).

stronger.$description: Stronger border color for primary actions or messages (blue.80).

strongest.$description: Strongest border color for primary actions or messages (blue.90).

weak.$description: Weak border color for primary actions or messages (blue.40).

weaker.$description: Weaker border color for primary actions or messages (blue.20).

weakest.$description: Weakest border color for primary actions or messages (blue.10).
